label: homotopy theory
evidence: Mathlib/Topology/Homotopy (407 decls) is the dedicated homotopy-theory folder: homotopic maps, fundamental groupoid/group, path homotopy, covering spaces.
verify_note: Path+decls OK; folder is homotopy-theory core. Evidence errs: FundamentalGroupoid/Covering are Topology/ siblings.

label: analytic number theory
evidence: L-functions/Dirichlet series (LSeries, 523 decls) are the core analytic-NT machinery in Mathlib; broader Mathlib/NumberTheory mixes algebraic NT so this subfolder is tighter.
verify_note: Folder = L-functions only; PrimeCounting/SelbergSieve/EulerProduct/ModularForms are siblings. Field >> folder scope.

label: harmonic analysis
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Fourier (402 decls) holds Fourier series/transform theory, the core of harmonic analysis as formalized in Mathlib.
verify_note: Path+decls OK; FourierTransform/PoissonSummation/RiemannLebesgue = Mathlib's harmonic-analysis core. QID verified.

label: harmonic analysis
evidence: Convolution (85 decls) is a standard harmonic-analysis tool (approximate identities, Young's inequality) alongside Fourier analysis.
verify_note: Single file defining convolution as a measure-theory tool, not a harmonic-analysis home; tightest concept=convolution.

label: metamathematics
evidence: Mathlib/ModelTheory (1626 decls: satisfiability, syntax, semantics, completeness) covers the model-theoretic core of metamathematics; proof-theoretic side is thin.
verify_note: Folder is model theory's home (own field, Q848882); metamath spans proof theory/computability/set theory elsewhere.

label: topological algebra
evidence: Mathlib/Topology/Algebra (6901 decls) is exactly topological algebraic structures: topological groups, rings, modules, fields.
verify_note: Path OK; children Group/Ring/Module/Field = topological algebra. Q964053 P31=branch of mathematics (conflated item).

label: algebraic logic
evidence: ModelTheory/Algebra (84 decls) formalizes algebraic structures as first-order theories, the closest existing Mathlib home to algebraic logic; coverage is thin/partial.
verify_note: Folder = FO theories OF rings/fields (model theory of algebra), not algebras-for-logic (Boolean/Heyting live in Order/).

label: algebraic combinatorics
evidence: Young diagrams/tableaux (89 decls) are a core algebraic-combinatorics object (RSK, symmetric functions link); tightest dedicated subfolder.
verify_note: 2 files (YoungDiagram, SSYT; 89 decls) = one object, not the field's home; tightest concept is Young tableau.

label: algebraic combinatorics
evidence: Enumerative combinatorics (455 decls) overlaps algebraic combinatorics (generating functions, compositions) though the two fields aren't identical.
verify_note: Folder is enumerative combinatorics' own home (Catalan/Bell/Stirling/Partition); different field; evidence admits it.

label: finite geometry
evidence: Configuration.lean (47 decls) formalizes abstract point-line incidence configurations (projective-plane-style axioms), the core finite-geometry object in Mathlib.
verify_note: Configuration.lean verified: incidence axioms, ProjectivePlane+order, finite counting thms; only finite geom in Mathlib.

label: graph theory
evidence: Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph (3274 decls) is the large, well-developed dedicated graph-theory folder (connectivity, coloring, matchings, walks).
verify_note: Path+3274 decls OK; Acyclic/AdjMatrix/Coloring/Clique/Connectivity = dedicated graph-theory folder. Q131476 verified.
